title: 1 Boring Stock Investors Need to Know About in 2024 -- It's Crushed the Market for Decades
text: Amphenol has obliterated market returns over the long term. The company relies on manufacturing excellence supplemented with strategic acquisitions to fuel its profit growth.

title: PCTEL Announces Closing of its Acquisition by Amphenol Corporation
text: BLOOMINGDALE, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--PCTEL, Inc. (Nasdaq: PCTI) (“PCTEL” or the “Company”), a leading global provider of wireless technology solutions, today announced that it has been acquired by Amphenol Corporation (NYSE: APH) (“Amphenol”), one of the world's largest providers of high-technology interconnect, sensor and antenna solutions. Under the terms of the previously announced agreement, PCTEL stockholders are receiving $7.00 in cash for each share of common stock they own. Following th.

title: 7 Upcoming Dividend Increases
text: Companies that consistently increase their dividends perform better than those that don't. The article provides insights on upcoming dividend increases for investors to consider. With two weeks left, it's last call for dividend increases for 2023.

title: Insiders Are Buying These 3 Tech Stocks
